input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`))

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`))

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`plain_amount`))

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`plain_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb3 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`plain_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb3

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET latin1 NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`plain_amount`)) DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1

input.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`amount`)) DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb3_general_ci

output.sql: CREATE TABLE t_account_bak_for_create (id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cipher_password VARCHAR(510) NOT NULL, assisted_query_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, like_query_password VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL, plain_password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `t_account_bak_amount_idx` (`plain_amount`)) DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb3_general_ci
